rules.rule_text:
rule android_meterpreter
{
	meta:
		author = "73mp74710n"
		comment = "Metasploit Android Meterpreter Payload"

	strings:
		$checkPK = "META-INF/PK"
		$checkHp = "[Hp^"
		$checkSdeEncode = /;.Sk/
		$stopEval = "eval"
		$stopBase64 = "base64_decode"

	condition:
		any of ( $check* ) or any of ( $stop* )
}

rule_metadata.name: isExecutable
rule_metadata.author: 73mp74710n
rule_metadata.description: Yara rule to check for unobfuscated rat created with njrat
